title: (Bullish Signal) FARO, Stochastic Oscillator left the oversold zone on Jan 05, 21
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that FARO's price trend could be reversing, and it may be an opportunity to buy the stock or explore call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 58 similar cases where FARO's stochastic oscillator exited the oversold zone, and 52 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 90%. Current price $73.70 is above $69.15 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 12/02/20 - 01/05/21, the price experienced a +4% Uptrend, while the week of 12/28/20 - 01/05/21 shows a -1% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/i2tulnhtgr961.png?width=1533&format=png&auto=webp&s=76d9d3d2926f6e2bf06990bb7b47800aef587799

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

FARO moved above its 50-day Moving Average on September 28, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for FARO crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on October 02, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 15 of 21 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 71%.

Following a +1.57% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where FARO advanced for three days, in 207 of 290 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 71%.

FARO may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 132 of 193 cases where FARO Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 68%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8630564-faro-technologies-s-faro-70-75-stochastic-oscillator-left-the-oversold-zone-on-january-05-2021?utm_source=raddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
